title: hyptis mutabilis var. micrantha
intro: Hyptis mutabilis var. micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the 'Brazilian rosemary'. It is a shrub native to Brazil, known for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Hyptis mutabilis var. micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils for medicinal use, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
